review_title: Get what you want with ITCS-webclock
author: Andrew W.
pros: My love for this tool goes to the use of biometric while integration while checking in to work. It works magnificiently
cons: There is limited support and they are unresponsive when you need them

description: Compliance, reliability, dependability and accountability. Kind of says it all when you don't have a good time system.
author: Kurt R.
pros: Great sales discipline. Listened to our needs and didn't push for things we don't need right now. Once we agreed on what to move forward with, implementation became the priority. Our sales person stayed involved all the way through to make sure the implementation was seamless and successful. I felt like I was part of the team and process.
cons: Would like the software to not allow employees to punch in or out unless their GPS is enabled.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Amanda S.
pros: I like the idea of this software. Keeping track of PTO and employee time.
cons: Taylored training is a must. Better set up is a must. When there is an issue, instead of figuring out what the issue was, they wanted us to force balance the time. Which means, we would be doing that forever. I let the trainer know, that instead of that, it would be better to figure out what was wrong so that it could be fixed going forward. That conversation was after I figured out what the problems were.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: A great ease of use with this company
description: Easy, fast and simple. i am able to count on my hours being tracked correctly with this program.
author: Bryson G.
pros: the ease of use within the time clock feature
cons: nothing to dislike, the software is easy to use and understand

description: Overall, ITCS-WebClock is a dependable time management tool that streamlines workforce management. While it could benefit from improved customization and a modernized interface, it delivers on its core functionalities effectively.
author: khalil B.
pros: The system is user-friendly, with intuitive navigation and reliable time tracking features. It simplifies employee scheduling and ensures accurate record-keeping.
cons: The reporting tools could be more customizable, and the interface sometimes feels outdated compared to modern software standards.

review_title: If I have any chance to work with them I like to work with them.and definitely recommend others.
description: It's a great experience with the working projects and all the new technology that they are using.
author: Patel D.
pros: I like the most is the service's are the best.
cons: The working projects is that I like most.

description: The set up and integration were easy and completed without issue and within the promised timeframe, the team at WebClock is phenomenal. Training for my staff was informative and customized to provide what we needed, when we needed it, and delivered to who we needed it delivered to. Working with Travis was (and remains) a pleasure. Customer Support is knowledgeable and responsive. Overall the system does what we need it to do without issue and the people behind the system have proven that they take personal responsibility for the product that they put out. They were willing to make changes within the system to accommodate some specific needs that we had and worked with me to make sure that the platform not only met but exceeded our needs and expectations. Honestly not what I expected going in, as my previous experiences in this arena have been less than stellar, it is nice to know that there are companies out there that still care about not only the product that they put out but the end user and their experience in the environment.
author: Jules C.
pros: It works the way I need it to work, consistently. That is a big deal when you have 140 employees in multiple states and at 6 locations. Since the switch I have been able to stop thinking about time and labor management every minute of the day.
cons: There isn't anything that I can say I dislike about the platform.

author: Paula H.
pros: This product is easy to use and helpful when you have to modify weekly timesheets and run employee's PTO / vacation time/ audit reports.
cons: The delay from entering the New Hire into the Engage system to waiting almost 2 hours for the new hire information to port over to the Web Clock system.

author: Emre Ç.
pros: "Simple and Easy to Use". I integrated it into my payroll and it worked flawlessly. The overall quality is good.
cons: In general, I did not have a problem and I was satisfied. customer service responds very quickly when you have a problem.

author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Ease of integration and user interface make it easy for users to time track and accurately report their time
cons: No issues encountered. Loving every bit of this new product
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Very dependable software. Excellent support - [SENSITIVE CONTENT] did an awesome job assisting us.
author: Christopher S.
pros: Minimal maintenance and extent of reporting capibility
cons: There is nothing I have found yet that I felt fail short.

author: Darrin E.
pros: The software has very easy access and very informal information, to lead you to a solution if there are any problems.
cons: There is nothing to add other than you are doing a great job.

author: Nellene H.
pros: It also does my PBJ hours for us and they submit to CMS. :)
cons: Issues with internet with phone app working and just some days logging in.

author: Antionette B.
pros: The ease of tracking time and running reports.
cons: Not being able to customize the look and color.

description: The team is very responsive and helpful.
author: Jackie R.
pros: The service is easy to set up and extremely easy to use.
cons: Any feature requests we had were acknowledges and either worked or are scheduled to be worked.

author: Tonya T.
pros: The ease of use and ability to customize
cons: There is nothing that I haven't been able to work through to dislike.

description: Simple product that does the job we need
author: Angela M.
pros: Product is simple with options to expand
cons: occassional glitches when we cannot access the software online

description: ITCS since on boarding and now, always have the support email team, that is great.
author: PEGGY D.
pros: The software was easy to use. The import feature with my Payroll company.
cons: going to different screens for employees profile, timecard. But WebClock did an upgrade this year and combine that. Now it's even easier to use.

author: Michaelene P.
pros: Interfaces with our PEO and is constantly updated with our changing employee turnover.
cons: The scheduling feature is great; however, certain parameters need to be confirmed at time of entering the schedules.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Tina C.
pros: Ease of contacting support personnel & quick response
cons: No concerns at this time. 40 characters is too many
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: EXcellent. [SENSITIVE CONTENT] with tech support was extremely helpful
author: Scott A.
pros: It was a little rough implementing it but once I learned with help frmo [SENSITIVE CONTENT]in tech support is was great
cons: We are very new using this software so currently there is nothing I do not like about it.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: The most impact to our organization is that the WebClock system calculates and keeps records of PTO's for us.
author: Elvia A.
pros: The product is very user friendly. I like the bold colors and easy to find resources on the various pages.
cons: The only issues we had were related to PTO balances and accrual. Once we ironed them out, everything worked well.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Frank S.
pros: Good System to work with. Very clear and direct
cons: I do not have a negative thing to mention. Very helpful desk as well

author: Melissa R.
pros: This software is super easy to use and much better than any other time clock we have used. Very user friendly.
cons: There are a few things in the scheduling functionality that it doesn't allow you to do but we are hopefully getting those issues resolved.
author_industry: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Connie D.
pros: We really like the GPS features. And all the other tracking features.
cons: We really have not found anything wrong with the product so far.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
